heading: Powers
label: 152106 Powers
text: The corporation has only the powers provided in its bylaws and articles of incorporation filed in each State in which it is incorporated.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)15210636:4102., , .Nov. 14, 1988Pub. L. 100–655, § 102102 Stat. 3849The words “and subject to the laws of such State or States” are omitted as unnecessary.
